name: Coinbase Prime Institutional Trading and Custody API
what_it_does: Coinbase Prime institutional trading and custody REST API for hedge funds, asset managers, corporate treasuries, and financial institutions to access institutional-grade crypto custody, algorithmic trading, financing, and staking services through Coinbase's NASDAQ-listed regulated institutional platform — enabling institutional crypto asset management, algorithmic order execution, portfolio management, and regulatory-compliant custody through Coinbase Prime's broker-dealer and custodial infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage portfolio for institutional digital asset tracking automation, handle order execution for algorithmic crypto trading automation, access custody for regulated digital asset safekeeping automation, retrieve financing for crypto-collateralized lending automation, manage staking for institutional PoS yield automation, handle web3 wallet for institutional on-chain operations automation, access reporting for institutional compliance and audit automation, retrieve allocation for block trade and post-trade allocation automation, manage transfer for crypto fund movement automation, and integrate Coinbase Prime with institutional investment management, fund administration, and trading systems for regulated crypto prime brokerage automation.
use_cases: Executing algorithmic institutional crypto trading with market, limit, and TWAP orders for fund management automation agents
Managing institutional digital asset custody with Coinbase's NASDAQ-listed regulated custodian for treasury automation agents
Processing institutional crypto staking for ETH and other PoS assets through Coinbase Prime's staking infrastructure automation agents
Integrating Coinbase Prime with institutional OMS and portfolio management platforms for crypto allocation automation agents
not_for: Retail consumer crypto trading (Coinbase Prime is institutional minimum AUM only)
DeFi or fully decentralized operations (Coinbase Prime is centralized institutional broker-dealer)
Micro-transactions (Coinbase Prime serves large institutional transaction minimums)
best_when: An institutional hedge fund, asset manager, or corporate treasury wanting AI agents to execute algorithmic crypto trading, manage institutional custody, and integrate prime brokerage services through Coinbase's regulated NASDAQ-listed institutional platform.
avoid_when: INSTITUTIONAL MINIMUMS AND ONBOARDING: Coinbase Prime requires substantial AUM minimums and comprehensive institutional due diligence; automated retail developer access assumption creates pending_institutional_review; automated must complete Coinbase Prime institutional onboarding. SEC AND CFTC REGULATIONS: Coinbase Prime operates as regulated broker-dealer under SEC and CFTC jurisdiction; automated unregulated crypto trading assumption creates compliance violations; automated must understand SEC/CFTC regulatory requirements for institutional crypto trading. API KEY IS INSTITUTIONAL NOT RETAIL: Coinbase Prime API credentials are separate from consumer Coinbase API; automated consumer Coinbase API credential reuse assumption creates authentication_failed for Prime API; automated must obtain separate Coinbase Prime API credentials. WEBSOCKET FOR REAL-TIME DATA: Coinbase Prime offers WebSocket for real-time market data and order updates; automated REST-only assumption misses real-time event streams; automated should use WebSocket for order status and market data in trading applications.

auth.notes: Coinbase Prime uses API key + ECDSA signature for authentication. REST API with JSON + WebSocket. San Francisco, CA HQ. NASDAQ:COIN. Founded 2021 (Prime; Coinbase founded 2012). Products: Custody, trading (spot, derivatives), financing, staking, web3 wallet, reporting. SDKs: Python, JS, Go. Regulated broker-dealer, custodian. FINRA member. SEC registered. Institutional focus (hedge funds, asset managers, corporates). Competes with Fireblocks and Genesis for institutional crypto prime brokerage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public sandbox; institutional sandbox for approved partners
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-trade commissions; AUM-based custody fees; financing interest rates; staking fees; custom institutional pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. NASDAQ:COIN. Per-trade + AUM custody. Regulated broker-dealer. Institutional crypto prime.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key and portfolio; order APIs optimized for institutional throughput

known_agent_gotchas: ECDSA SIGNATURE REQUIRED: Coinbase Prime API requires ECDSA signature on every request using API private key; automated API-key-header-only assumption creates authentication_invalid; automated must implement ECDSA signing with timestamp, path, and payload for all requests

PORTFOLIO ID IS REQUIRED: Coinbase Prime organizes assets by portfolio; automated account-based assumption misses portfolio_id requirement in API calls; automated must specify correct portfolio_id for all trading and custody operations

WEBSOCKET FOR REAL-TIME: Order status, fills, and market data are available via WebSocket; automated REST-polling-only assumption creates delayed order awareness and high API load; automated should use WebSocket subscriptions for real-time order management

SANDBOX IS GATED: Coinbase Prime sandbox requires institutional approval; automated open sandbox access assumption creates no test environment; automated must apply for institutional sandbox access before integration development

SEPARATE CREDENTIALS FROM CONSUMER COINBASE: Coinbase Prime API keys are completely separate from consumer Coinbase Advanced Trade or retail APIs; automated credential reuse assumption creates authentication_failed; automated must obtain dedicated Coinbase Prime institutional credentials
agent_readiness.security_notes: Institutional crypto prime brokerage. SEC, FINRA, CFTC, FinCEN, OFAC. API key + ECDSA. US. Institutional trading and custody data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Institutional crypto prime. SEC, FINRA, CFTC, FinCEN. API key + ECDSA. US. Institutional trading and custody data.
